turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi. I'm calling to ask about package rates. My father needs a full body check-up. Do you have any health packages?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we do have health check-up packages at Sunrise. We have a Basic, Comprehensive, and Senior Citizen package. Which age group is your father in?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: The Senior Citizen package would be most suitable. It includes CBC, lipid profile, thyroid, blood sugar, ECG, chest X-ray, and a consultation. It's priced at 3,200 rupees.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That sounds good. Is there a home collection option?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, for the package we can arrange home sample collection for an additional 200 rupees. The remaining tests like ECG and X-ray would need to be done at the clinic.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay let me discuss with my father and call back.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course, take your time. We're here whenever you're ready!
